name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: NATIONAL REVIEW HIGHLIGHTS KELLY LOEFFLER'S JOURNEY FROM THE FARM TO THE U.S. SENATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, DECEMBER 26, 2020

ICYMI: NATIONAL REVIEW HIGHLIGHTS KELLY LOEFFLER'S JOURNEY FROM THE FARM TO THE U.S. SENATE ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler spoke with the National Review's Ryan Mills about how she went from her family's farm to the floor of the New York Stock Exchange to the United States Senate. Senator Loeffler has lived the American Dream - and now she is helping keep it alive for generations to come.
Read excerpts below and the full article [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XErc1sgPIJ8GQT9v4lSg8ngRxEtDeXYlQ5LViAr16ePlw81eDom24tWYReTpfGSANTfIVgUrm2YlbGzjbm72D8_EZyxS6qNUsx57vfuXT-yU__UkLkQZHxyrP6FRXF-kBu4IYRwwJ_vZ0R2BfuivpzvfTx_sIE1Cp80ifhqza4qRlubxesLdyKsMXEjicfSXb-drv5f4qSfOpWtH8mRICIRDP1_HyrfNvX5CIxcuc3JS-jceSWqb8N4vBMMCg60hI19IDtpOi5AilOcxAEb2Eg==&c=KfyfpHW4MbqJZUmXhVdMAX4Gz4f7WcHmkwBt1hVsFw9BLPxrvSTQag==&ch=m5Se5C1E_oGkqDUT3ezDPutc_FidudNlstOwuJVH8NFa9uzEFFMpxQ==).
..."That's where she started, in a bean field. And she would punch a clock just like I would," Marquis said of Loeffler, now an incumbent senator in Georgia, whose [runoff race on Jan. 5](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XErc1sgPIJ8GQT9v4lSg8ngRxEtDeXYlQ5LViAr16ePlw81eDom24tWYReTpfGSAEvqtiSsIt3bUh20ZolD7KPvrK1em-irpEG2-La099yYW8r4audWOIhYlv5GYK0iIPmkLmvmb_bLXvSWY8x4GDKbOLp2E-EO2_KDEgQUEBW-SfVgK4tfSrubEf3nvVVKk3LfPfLcvzgQKtCJXAttlLxeb1MNgtBi3&c=KfyfpHW4MbqJZUmXhVdMAX4Gz4f7WcHmkwBt1hVsFw9BLPxrvSTQag==&ch=m5Se5C1E_oGkqDUT3ezDPutc_FidudNlstOwuJVH8NFa9uzEFFMpxQ==) is one of two in the state that will determine control of the U.S. Senate for at least the next two years.
...Loeffler's friends from her youth paint a picture of a woman raised by parents who instilled a strong work ethic, and a friend who was driven to succeed in everything she was involved in, from academics to sports to civics.
But as involved as she was on the farm, at her school, in the community, and in sports and clubs, she also stood out because of the vision she had for a future beyond her small town.
...Loeffler said she decided to take the plunge into national politics after her business career highlighted for her the impact of governmental policies and regulations on business formation, job creation, the country's competitiveness internationally, "and how Washington really did not put that on the forefront of policy."
..."I feel really good about our message. I feel really good about our ground game," [Loeffler] said. "We've got a couple more weeks left and we're going to work every day until we get it done."
---
| ### Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary [caitlin@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XErc1sgPIJ8GQT9v4lSg8ngRxEtDeXYlQ5LViAr16ePlw81eDom24o8depRILAZW7rd2ru7gdB-SfVm8X2lR1kXQquTzuS8DsuTigfvY2sNFNzhaa0mv8x2U_yHR7t9f6bMhKZwWTgAd2QT5lt-1iMmMydna05ca&c=KfyfpHW4MbqJZUmXhVdMAX4Gz4f7WcHmkwBt1hVsFw9BLPxrvSTQag==&ch=m5Se5C1E_oGkqDUT3ezDPutc_FidudNlstOwuJVH8NFa9uzEFFMpxQ==)
---
|

name: Mitch McConnell (iPhone)
subject: With just over one week to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
We're just over one week out from Election Day in Georgia and I'm afraid I have some bad news. As of this moment, Democrats have the momentum necessary to WIN on January 5th and take back control of the Senate, putting this nation on a path of destruction. In order to prevent that from happening, we need EVERY GRASSROOTS CONSERVATIVE to CHIP IN to our Georgia Senate Battleground Fund.

Dear Friend,

subject: Friend, something you don’t hear enough

body:
Look, I get it. You have been receiving lots of emails and text messages asking for your support over the last few weeks. You have been one of my most loyal supporters and wanted to drop a quick note just to say THANK YOU.
Friend,

Look, I get it. You have been receiving lots of emails and text messages asking for your support over the last few weeks.

You have been one of my most loyal supporters and wanted to drop a quick note just to say THANK YOU.

I am grateful for every donation, every prayer and every action you have taken to help protect the Senate Majority.

The Senate runoffs in Georgia are TIED and the far-Left is pulling out all the stops to FLIP the Senate.

On my recent trip to campaign in Georgia, I was inspired to see so many committed conservatives working together to hold the line and defend our Senate majority.

Friend, I know you may not be able to make it to Georgia to knock on doors or make phone calls-- _**but your support over the last few months has been just as important.**_

We are in the home stretch and I didn't want one more day to pass without officially saying THANK YOU.

Tim Scott

P.S. body:
We're on a short timeline so I'll keep this quick. I'm asking every Trump supporter reading this to chip in $17 right now to save the Senate.
Friend -- We're on a short timeline so I'll keep this quick.
